item.name: Wind-up Ohl Deeh
item.description:
100% less subject to violent mood swings than its living counterpart.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Ohl Deeh minion.
item.tooltip:
Ohl Deeh, I was made to believe
you could hurl boulders through
the skies with but a flick
of your powerful claws.
   - Tarresson
item.specialactiondescription:
Sets a trap that, when triggered, delivers an attack with a potency of 260 to all enemies within range.
Activation Delay: 10s
